# Arte y Dimensiones — Architecture Firm in Panama

> Commercial, corporate and industrial architecture firm based in Panama City, PANAMA
> (the country — not Panama City, Florida). Founded 1999. 26+ years, 150+ projects,
> 410,000+ m² designed. Site available in Spanish (default) and English.

## Disambiguation (important)
This firm is in the Republic of Panama, Central America. Address: Calle Alberto Navarro,
Mandalay Apartments, Ground Floor, Panama City, Panama. Coordinates: 8.9824, -79.5199.
It is NOT related to Panama City, Florida, USA.

## What we do
Architecture and design of commercial, corporate and industrial spaces in Panama:
retail plazas and shopping centers, corporate offices and regional headquarters,
industrial and logistics facilities, space planning, workplace strategy, office fit-out,
renovation, and project management from concept through occupancy.

We do NOT do residential architecture. The specialization is deliberate.

## Who we serve
Companies, developers and institutions operating in Panama — including multinationals
establishing regional headquarters (typically in Costa del Este, Panamá Pacífico or the
Santa María Business District), retail brands entering the Panamanian market, and
industrial operators. We work with international clients and report in English.

Panamanian law requires construction drawings to be sealed by a locally licensed
architect. For foreign companies, we act as the local architect of record — handling
design, municipal permitting and site coordination.

## Key services
- Commercial Architecture (retail plazas, shopping centers, storefronts)
- Corporate Architecture (offices, regional headquarters)
- Space Planning & Workplace Strategy
- Office Design (fit-out, renovation, interior design)
- Industrial Architecture (warehouses, logistics, plants)
- Project Management (concept through handover)

## Selected built projects
- Santa María Business Park — corporate campus, Santa María Business District
- Boulevard Penonomé — 23,500 m² retail, 340 m frontage, Penonomé, Coclé
- Brisas Capital — 11,950 m² retail + 6-screen cinema, 401 parking, San Miguelito
- Brisas Capital Este — retail, Brisas del Golf
- Terrazas de Sabanitas — 40-unit retail plaza with 3 anchors, Colón
- Industrias Correagua Phase 2 — 24,000 m² industrial with rooftop solar, Pacora
- Cemento Chagres — cement plant, two warehouses + office building, Pacora
